name: Q1935815
abstract: Milt Larkin (October 10, 1910, Navasota, Texas – August 31, 1996) was an American jazz trumpeter,  bandleader and singer.

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: Benny Carter and Illinois Jacquet

about_quotes.speaker: Arnett Cobb
about_quotes.evidence: When I got with Milton Larkin, we had a band that we billed with Milton supervising the situation

about_quotes.speaker: Gus Johnson
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] : Larkin, Milt Larkin. >> [INTERVIEWEE] Milt Larkin. Well, I -- ... [INTERVIEWER] Was he with Milt Larkin's band? >> [INTERVIEWEE] He used to play in Milt Larkin's band.
